---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the simulation-first IT operations copilot
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the workflow or capability you want to add.

## Scenario

- Onboarding
- Offboarding
- Access troubleshooting
- Ticket analysis
- Reporting
- Safety guardrails
- Other:

## Expected Behavior

What should the copilot plan, check, or report?

## Safety Considerations

Confirm that the feature can run with mock data and does not require real tenant or SaaS credentials.

## Additional Context

Add examples, mock inputs, or sample outputs if useful.
